regulations.title: Swiss VOC Ordinance Update
regulations.summary: Cantonal inspections underway; emission inventory submissions due March 2026.

regulations.title: Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism
regulations.summary: Dairy products outside scope; Article 30 review expected Q2 2026.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Draft delegated act classifies EVOH multilayer cartons as Class C non-recyclable; EPR surcharges from 2028.

regulations.title: Verpackungsdurchführungsgesetz Amendment
regulations.summary: Article 12c EPR fee differentiation for non-recyclable packaging; consultation closes 31 March 2026.

regulations.title: EU Taxonomy Regulation — Article 8 Disclosures
regulations.summary: Taxonomy alignment assessment in progress; water intensity data collection underway.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Supplier mapping in progress; geolocation declarations for soy feed expected March 2026.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: ESMA guidance requires facility-level gender pay gap; supplier audit programme initiated.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
regulations.summary: Austrian bill first reading approved; private right of action for trade unions included.
